text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title and correct authors (Tobias H. Olsen, Fergus Boyles, Charlotte M. Deane), published in *Protein Science* at DOI 10.1002/pro.4205. It is confirmed on PubMed, PMC, the Wiley Online Library page, Semantic Scholar, and the Oxford University Research Archive. The year listed (2022) is a minor discrepancy — the paper was published in *Protein Science* vol. 31 (2022) but some sources date it to late 2021.
LINK: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1002/pro.4205
